prompt:
You are an investment assistant proposing additions to an existing equity portfolio.
Cash available: USD 1500.00.
Allowed universe: MA, ADBE, ANET, V, MSCI.
Already owned: MSFT, TSM, NVO, SPGI.
Recommend at most 2 tickers.
Facts you may cite: owned_tickers_are_not_additions, ma_policy_candidate, adbe_policy_candidate, max_two_ideas_requested.
Reply with one JSON object and nothing else, in the form {"tickers": ["AAA", "BBB"], "amounts": [500.0, 750.0], "cited_fact_ids": ["id1"]}. Do not recommend already-owned tickers. Do not include an "amounts" field unless explicitly required. Cite only fact ids provided.
